vocab.meaning: nỗi ám ảnh/niềm đam mê của cả quốc gia
vocab.example: Football is more than just a game here; it is a national obsession that brings everything to a standstill during major finals.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí cổ vũ cuồng nhiệt/đầy tính ủng hộ
vocab.example: The stadium was filled with a partisan atmosphere as fans cheered relentlessly for their local team.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/kỹ năng thể thao xuất sắc
vocab.example: Our culture highly respects individuals who demonstrate exceptional sporting prowess in collective games like volleyball.

vocab.meaning: tình đồng chí và tình bằng hữu
vocab.example: Beyond the physical benefits, team sports are popular because they build lasting camaraderie and fellowship among players.

vocab.meaning: thu hút sự đưa tin/truyền thông rộng rãi
vocab.example: Inter-school basketball tournaments usually garner massive coverage from local news outlets.

vocab.meaning: ở vị trí dẫn đầu/quan trọng nhất
vocab.example: In the realm of physical education, team-based activities are always at the forefront of the curriculum.

vocab.word: unite people from all walks of life
vocab.ipa: /juːˈnaɪt ˈpiː.pəl frəm ɔːl wɔːks əv laɪf/
vocab.meaning: gắn kết mọi người từ mọi tầng lớp xã hội
vocab.example: A major victory for the national rugby team has the power to unite people from all walks of life.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác về bản sắc cộng đồng
vocab.example: Supporting a local sports club provides residents with a strong sense of communal identity and pride.

vocab.meaning: những trận đấu tranh giành quyết liệt
vocab.example: The annual derby is one of the most highly contested matches of the season, drawing thousands of spectators.

vocab.meaning: nhen nhóm/làm nảy sinh tinh thần cạnh tranh
vocab.example: Participating in team sports at a young age helps instill a competitive streak that can be beneficial in later career stages.
